decisions.briefing: Markets are clearly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 0.9% and the S&P 500 up 0.6%, giving a green light to deploy the remaining $943 in cash. I'm filling three of the four open slots with the two highest-scoring momentum candidates (INFQ and MDB, both score 95) plus CHRN (score 90), all of which sit in the ideal RSI 55–70 bullish zone rather than overbought territory. Holding one slot in reserve as a buffer given the many overbought candidates on today's screener.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities extended their recent rally on Thursday with the NASDAQ leading at +0.9%, driven by continued enthusiasm around AI infrastructure spending and resilient consumer data. Tech and growth names outperformed as investors rotated back into risk assets following a period of caution around trade policy. The S&P 500's +0.6% gain reflected broad participation, with cyclicals and small caps joining the move higher.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週四延續近期升勢，納斯達克指數領漲0.9%，主要受到市場對人工智能基礎設施投資持續樂觀情緒及消費數據韌性的推動。科技及成長股表現突出，投資者在此前對貿易政策保持謹慎之後重新增持風險資產。標普500指數上漲0.6%，走勢廣泛，週期股及小型股亦同步跟進。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that bets on stocks already trending upward to continue rising. Traders use signals like RSI (measuring how fast a stock is moving) and MACD (comparing short vs. long-term price averages) to identify stocks with strong momentum. The sweet spot is an RSI between 55–70: strong enough to show real buying interest, but not so high (above 70) that the stock is overbought and due for a pullback.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，押注其繼續走強。投資者運用RSI（衡量股價上漲速度）和MACD（比較短期與長期均線差距）等技術指標來識別強勁動能股。理想狀態是RSI介於55至70之間——既顯示出真實的買盤興趣，又未達到70以上的超買水平，避免面臨回調風險。
